description: 5-level nested IF with MOVE at deepest level — all conditions true sets WS-FLAG='DEEP'
notes: Five nested IF conditions: X=1, Y=2, Z=3, W=4, V=5. All match, so MOVE 'DEEP' TO WS-FLAG executes at the innermost level. Tests deeply nested IF without ELSE branches — engine must generate correct indentation and scoping for 5 levels.
